options.C: A specific user for a number of installations of software
options.D: Cores on a physical server or virtual machine
options.E: A specific device for a number of installations of software

explanation: Contrairement au 'Named Device' qui cible une machine, la métrique 'Per Named User' couvre un collaborateur spécifique (nommé via allocation). Ce collaborateur est ensuite généralement autorisé à installer et utiliser le logiciel sur un certain nombre de ses propres appareils (selon les termes du contrat).

question: What is the most significant risk your organization is exposed to when you continue to use end-of-life / end-of support software?

options.A: No access to redacted software features

explanation: Bien que les problèmes de performance (D) ou les coûts inutiles (B) soient problématiques, le risque absolument majeur avec les logiciels en fin de vie (EOL) est l'arrêt de la publication des correctifs de sécurité par l'éditeur. Cela crée des vulnérabilités béantes exposant l'entreprise aux cyberattaques (C).

question: Which of the following are tiers of software reconciliation results? (Choose two.)
explanation: Les quatre niveaux officiels de granularité des résultats de réconciliation dans le License Workbench sont : Publisher, Product, Software Model, et License Metric. L'Allocation et le Droit (Entitlement) sont des sources de données, pas des niveaux de résultat.

question: Baseline license metrics are defined for which of the following? (Choose three.)
explanation: Dans la configuration de base de ServiceNow (sans packs éditeurs spécifiques), les métriques logicielles ciblent nativement la consommation basée sur : les Cœurs matériels (Cores), les Processeurs physiques/virtuels (Processors), et les Appareils ou Utilisateurs (Devices/Users).

question: Which of the following are valid Remediation Options on the License Workbench after reconciliation has been run? (Choose three.)
explanation: Pour corriger une non-conformité depuis le License Workbench, les options officielles de remédiation automatisée incluent la suppression des allocations inutiles (B), le retrait des installations qui n'ont pas d'allocations liées (C) et la désinstallation des logiciels découverts sans aucune licence (D).

question: Which of the following are valid States of Remediation Options on the License Workbench after reconciliation has been run? (Choose three.)
explanation: Le cycle de vie exact d'une option de remédiation passe par les statuts : 'Nouveau' (New) lors de sa création, 'En cours' (In Progress) lorsqu'elle est actionnée, puis 'Terminé' (Complete) une fois que le changement (achat, allocation, désinstallation) a été appliqué avec succès.

question: What are Restricted software installations?

options.A: Software installations that are unlicensed and unallocated
options.D: Software installations that are not normalized
options.E: Software installations that are unauthorized for use

explanation: Les logiciels dits 'Restreints' (Restricted / Blacklisted) sont des installations découvertes sur le parc informatique qui contreviennent aux politiques de l'entreprise et qui n'ont reçu aucune autorisation d'utilisation de la part de la DSI ou de la sécurité.

question: Once you are ready to retire software in ServiceNow, what is the critical first step in the retirement process?

options.A: Notify users of the software retirement
options.C: Uninstall all instances of the software

explanation: Avant de retirer le modèle ou de désinstaller le logiciel, la première action administrative et financière cruciale est de faire expirer tous les droits logiciels (Entitlements) associés pour éviter qu'ils ne soient réalloués ou faussement pris en compte dans les prochaines réconciliations financières.

question: After importing your entitlements via the template where would you navigate to address any entitlement import errors?

options.A: System Import Sets > Load Data > Entitlement Import Errors
options.D: Software Asset > Licensing > Entitlement import Errors

explanation: ServiceNow regroupe intelligemment les fonctions métier. Pour corriger des erreurs d'import de droits, vous n'allez pas dans les outils système globaux, mais directement dans la section métier appropriée : 'Software Asset > Licensing > Entitlement import Errors'.

question: Which are valid States of Remediation Options on the Software Asset Workspace License usage view after reconciliation has been run? (Choose three.)
explanation: Dans la nouvelle interface (Software Asset Workspace), les états fondamentaux des options de remédiation restent les mêmes que dans l'interface classique (Workbench) : 'New' à la création, 'In Progress' pendant l'exécution, et 'Complete' à la fin. Les mots 'Done' ou 'Cancelled' (Caduque) ne sont pas les statuts primaires.

question: Which feature provides step-by step guidance for setting up entitlements?
explanation: Dans les versions récentes de ServiceNow (Workspace), le 'Guided Walkthrough Playbook' est une interface pas-à-pas (wizard) spécialement conçue pour guider les administrateurs novices lors de la création d'un droit (Entitlement), s'assurant qu'aucun champ financier ou contractuel critique ne soit oublié.

question: Which tab of the License usage view is used to reclaim software licenses that are not being used?
explanation: C'est dans l'onglet 'Removal Candidates' (Candidats à la suppression) que le système regroupe toutes les installations qui ont déclenché une règle de faible utilisation (Reclamation rule) et qui sont prêtes à être désinstallées pour récupérer la licence.

question: What are three ways to get software asset data into ServiceNow?
explanation: Comme répété dans de nombreuses questions de certification, les trois méthodes classiques de peuplement de la CMDB et de l'inventaire logiciel sont : la découverte automatique du réseau (Discovery), l'import massif de données (Import Data), et la création manuelle d'enregistrements (Manual).

question: Which feature provides detailed, actionable information for software reconciliation?

options.A: Software Asset Workspace Success portal view
options.B: Software Asset Workspace Software asset analytics view
options.C: Software Asset Workspace License usage view
options.D: Software Asset Workspace License operations view
options.E: Software Asset Workspace Normalization suggestions view

explanation: Dans la nouvelle interface moderne de ServiceNow SAM, c'est la vue 'License usage view' (Vue de l'utilisation des licences) qui sert de centre de commandement post-réconciliation. Elle fournit l'analyse détaillée des droits possédés versus les installations consommées.

question: By default, which persona is responsible for ensuring that the SAM program is rolled out and executed correctly and consistently across the organization?
explanation: Le propriétaire du processus (SAM process owner) est le dirigeant stratégique. Contrairement au gestionnaire (SAM manager) qui gère le quotidien, le Process Owner s'assure de l'adoption globale, de la gouvernance, et du succès global du déploiement de la gestion des actifs dans l'entreprise.

question: Which role is required to create custom license metrics?
explanation: Créer une métrique de licence personnalisée (Custom license metric) exige d'écrire des scripts de calcul dans ServiceNow (JavaScript). Cette tâche technique complexe de développement est donc exclusivement réservée au rôle 'sam_developer'.

question: Which steps are required to load software data into ServiceNow using system import sets? (Choose three.)
explanation: Le processus d'import de données (Import Sets) dans ServiceNow est immuable : 1) On charge les données brutes dans une table temporaire (Load data), 2) On crée une carte de transformation pour mapper les champs (Create transform map), et 3) On exécute la transformation pour insérer les données en base (Run transform).

question: What Microsoft maintenance program enables you to step up a standard version of your software to an enterprise edition?
explanation: La 'Software Assurance' est le programme de maintenance spécifique de Microsoft. Outre l'accès au support technique et aux correctifs, ce programme accorde souvent le droit de mettre à jour le logiciel ('Step-up rights' ou 'Upgrade rights') vers une édition supérieure ou une version plus récente sans racheter de licence pleine.

question: During the Source Request task, the SAM manager or administrator has what options? (Choose two.)
explanation: Lorsqu'un employé demande un logiciel via le portail, la tâche d'approvisionnement (Source Request) se déclenche. Le gestionnaire SAM a alors deux choix logiques : piocher dans le stock existant en allouant un droit disponible (Add allocation - E), ou lancer une procédure d'achat s'il n'y a plus de stock (Add purchase order - A).

question: When importing and/or manually entering software entitlement data into SAM you find that you do not have the Publisher Part Number (PPN) for several of your entitlements. What essential information is required in order for you to successfully add these entitlement records?

options.A: Agreement type, Purchased rights, Product, Asset tag, and Vendor
options.B: Publisher, Product, Version, Edition, Platform, and Language
options.C: Publisher, Product, License type, Purchased rights, Metric group, and License metric
options.D: Version, Edition, Platform, Purchased rights, Vendor, and Contract number

explanation: Si vous n'avez pas de PPN (qui automatise tout), vous devez saisir les composants minimaux qui définissent financièrement et techniquement ce droit. Ces éléments critiques sont : l'Éditeur, le Produit, le Type de licence, le nombre de Droits achetés, le Groupe de métrique et la Métrique spécifique de la licence.

question: Which application or feature can be used in baseline Software Asset Management (SAM) Professional to import software usage data?
explanation: In baseline SAM Professional, SCCM (Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager) is the supported integration for importing software usage data. While Discovery and other sources can feed data into ServiceNow, the out-of-the-box SAM Professional baseline integration for software usage data specifically leverages SCCM as the designated import source.

question: What methods can you use to store contract terms with your contracts? (Choose two.)

options.A: Attach a PDF of the contract to the contract record
options.B: Add the details in the Terms and Conditions section of the contract record
options.C: Add a link in the software entitlement record to the contract details stored in another location
options.D: Add the details in the Contract section of the software entitlement record
options.E: Add a link to the contract details the Assets covered record

explanation: ServiceNow contract records support two primary methods for storing contract terms: attaching a PDF of the physical contract directly to the contract record as an attachment, and entering the details directly in the Terms and Conditions section of the contract record. These two methods keep all contract information centralized within the contract record itself.

question: When using the ServiceNow Client Software Distribution (CSD) product in conjunction with Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) to automatically remove software and reclaim license rights in your environment which of the following is required?

options.A: The software to be removed must have been installed by SCCM
options.B: You must purchase Orchestration separately in order to revoke software and reclaim license rights using SAM Pro
options.C: The software to be removed must have been discovered by SCCM
options.D: An SCCM configuration record must be created to identify the application and the associated software discovery mode

explanation: To use CSD with SCCM for automated software removal and license reclamation, an SCCM configuration record must be created within ServiceNow. This record identifies the target application and the associated software discovery mode, enabling the integration to correctly locate and remove the software via SCCM. The software does not need to have been originally installed or discovered exclusively by SCCM.

question: What SAM feature automatically adds the next version and downgrade rights to a software model?
explanation: The SAM Content Service automatically enriches software models with publisher-provided data, including version upgrade rights and downgrade rights. By leveraging the Content Library maintained by ServiceNow, the Content Service keeps software models up to date without requiring manual intervention from the SAM administrator.

question: What statuses can a product have under the Software Asset Workspace License usage view on the Details tab? (Choose two.)
explanation: In the Software Asset Workspace License usage view on the Details tab, a product's compliance status is displayed as either Compliant or Not Compliant. These are the two definitive states used by SAM Professional to indicate whether the number of installations is within the number of entitled licenses or exceeds it.

question: License Change Projection works for which of the following change types? (Choose two.)
explanation: License Change Projection in SAM Professional is designed to work with Normal and Emergency change types within the ServiceNow Change Management process. This allows SAM to forecast how a proposed change will impact license compliance before the change is implemented, supporting proactive license governance for these two change categories.

question: What is the definition of Partially Normalized?

options.A: A discovery model was normalized based on publisher product version fields
options.B: A discovery model was normalized based on publisher field alone
options.C: A discovery model was normalized based on publisher and product fields only
options.D: The software discovery model has not yet competed its run through the normalization process
options.E: A discovery model normalized based on product field alone

explanation: Partially Normalized means that a discovery model has been matched and normalized at the publisher and product level, but not at the version level. Full normalization requires matching on publisher, product, and version; when the version cannot be identified, the model is considered only partially normalized.

question: Which of the following license metrics require allocations in order to maintain compliance? (Choose two.)
explanation: Per Named User and Per Named Device license metrics require explicit allocations because the license rights are tied to specific, identified individuals or devices rather than any user or device. Without allocations mapping the license to a specific named user or device, SAM cannot determine compliance for these metric types.

question: When Discovery identifies installed software in your environment, what table does it automatically store this data in?
explanation: When ServiceNow Discovery identifies installed software on devices in the environment, the data is automatically stored in the Software Installation table [cmdb_sam_sw_install]. This table serves as the central repository for discovered software installation records that are later used during the SAM reconciliation process.

question: What navigational functions does the Software Asset Workspace License usage view provide on the product Details tab? (Choose three.)
explanation: The Details tab in the License usage view of the Software Asset Workspace provides three key navigational functions: filtering products to narrow the displayed list, expanding and collapsing tree links to navigate hierarchical relationships, and the Expand All option to display all tree nodes at once. These features help SAM analysts efficiently navigate complex software model hierarchies.

question: Where can the Software Model Results, Removal Candidates, Entitlements, and Remediation Options related lists be accessed on the Software Asset Workspace after a reconciliation is run?
explanation: After a reconciliation run, the related lists for Software Model Results, Removal Candidates, Entitlements, and Remediation Options are all accessible from the License usage view in the Software Asset Workspace. This view acts as the central hub for reviewing reconciliation outcomes and taking corrective action.

question: Software discovery models are stored in which table?
explanation: Software discovery models in ServiceNow SAM are stored in the cmdb_sam_sw_discovery_model table. This table holds the raw software product information discovered from endpoints, which is then processed through the normalization engine to be matched against known software models in the Content Library.

question: What are Microsoft Office 365 reserved licenses used for?

options.A: To reserve a block of licenses for a specific group of users and/or user role(s)
options.B: To convert subscription licenses to regular per device licenses
options.C: To accurately calculate annual true-up cost and total spend on a product
options.D: To convert regular per user licenses into subscription licenses

explanation: In SAM Professional, Microsoft Office 365 reserved licenses are used to accurately calculate the annual true-up cost and total spend for a subscription product. They represent the committed license quantity in a subscription agreement, enabling the system to correctly project costs even when actual usage fluctuates throughout the subscription period.

question: Which SAM role grants a user the ability to set reclamation rules?
explanation: The sam_admin role is the highest-privilege SAM role and is required to configure reclamation rules. Reclamation rules are administrative settings that define the criteria under which unused software licenses can be automatically reclaimed, making this a function restricted to the SAM administrator.

question: To accurately report your true up costs during reconciliation, what must you update in your software models? (Choose two.)

options.C: License cost plus reserve license cost
options.E: License cost plus maintenance cost plus reserved license cost

explanation: To accurately calculate true-up costs during reconciliation, both the License cost and the Maintenance cost must be populated on the software model. These two fields together allow SAM to compute the full financial exposure for non-compliant or over-purchased software, giving an accurate picture of the total spend.

question: When creating entitlements on the Software Entitlement Form and selecting a product Publisher Part Number (PPN), what information is defaulted from the PPN? (Choose two.)
explanation: When a Publisher Part Number (PPN) is selected on the Software Entitlement Form, the License metric and License type are automatically defaulted from the PPN record. This data comes from the Content Library, which stores standardized entitlement attributes associated with each publisher's part numbers to reduce manual data entry errors.

question: When creating a purchase order, which feature allows sourcing a software model from multiple providers?
explanation: The Vendor Catalog item feature in ServiceNow allows a single software model to be associated with multiple vendors or resellers when creating purchase orders. This enables organizations to source the same software product from different providers and still track it under a unified software model for licensing and compliance purposes.

question: When no base system integration exists what SAM feature can a software asset manager use to create a custom integration to SaaS Software?
explanation: When no out-of-the-box integration exists for a SaaS application, SAM Professional provides the SaaS License Management connections feature, which allows administrators to build custom integrations to retrieve license and usage data from SaaS providers. This enables organizations to manage and optimize SaaS subscriptions even for applications not natively supported by the platform.

question: Using content library data to track a software model's lifecycle phase assists which ServiceNow product to perform application rationalization?
explanation: Technology Portfolio Management (TPM) leverages the lifecycle phase data maintained in SAM's Content Library to perform application rationalization. By knowing whether a software product is in active development, general availability, or end-of-life, TPM can help organizations make informed decisions about which applications to retain, replace, or retire.

question: Which consolidated dashboard in the new SAM Professional workspace enables you to organize, evaluate and view key metrics for Microsoft Office 365 and Adobe Cloud?
explanation: The SaaS Overview dashboard in the SAM Professional workspace is specifically designed to provide consolidated visibility into SaaS subscriptions, including Microsoft Office 365 and Adobe Cloud. It presents key metrics such as license consumption, active users, and optimization opportunities in a single unified view.

question: The process of determining compliance by comparing software rights owned with normalized software installations discovered is called what?
explanation: Reconciliation is the core SAM process that compares the software entitlements (rights owned) against the normalized software installations discovered on devices to determine the compliance position. It produces results such as over-licensed, under-licensed, or compliant status for each software product, forming the basis for remediation decisions.

question: During the normalization process a discovery model can be fully normalized based on which of these fields? (Choose three.)
explanation: Full normalization of a discovery model requires matching on three key fields: Publisher, Product, and Version. When all three are successfully matched against the Content Library, the discovery model achieves a Fully Normalized status, enabling accurate reconciliation and compliance reporting.

question: To automatically install software on devices using Workflow and Client Software Distribution (CSD) you must procure a separate license for what?
explanation: Orchestration is a separately licensed ServiceNow product that is required to automate software installation on devices through Workflow and Client Software Distribution (CSD). Orchestration provides the automation engine that executes remote commands and scripts on target devices, which is necessary for automated software deployment and removal.

question: Within ServiceNow Discovery, the Identification phase determines what?

options.B: How should I classify you specifically?
options.C: What else can you tell me about yourself?
options.D: Are you there? How will I classify you?

explanation: In the ServiceNow Discovery process, the Identification phase answers the question "Have I seen you before?" — it determines whether the discovered CI already exists in the CMDB by matching it against existing records using identification rules. This prevents duplicate CI creation and ensures the CMDB remains accurate.

question: What is unmanaged spend when viewing the Software Spend Detection Overview dashboard?

options.A: The total spend for transactions where the publisher and product are identified but there's no software model identified for the product
options.B: The total spend for transactions where the publisher, product, and software model are identified but there's no software installations identified for the product
options.C: The total spend for transactions that are not identified as an accounts payable spend or an expense spend
options.D: The total spend for transactions that are identified for an unmanaged publisher

explanation: Unmanaged spend on the Software Spend Detection Overview dashboard represents financial transactions where the publisher and product have been identified from spend data, but no corresponding software model exists in SAM to manage those licenses. This highlights software expenditure that is not yet under formal SAM governance.

question: When loading a small amount of data (i.e., a few records), which is the best method to use?

options.E: Use Discovery to find software on the network

explanation: For a small number of records, manually entering data through ServiceNow forms is the most efficient and appropriate method. Import sets and other automated mechanisms are better suited for large volumes of data, while manual entry via forms provides full control with minimal overhead for just a few records.

question: Does Performance Analytics (PA) come with Software Asset Management Professional?

options.C: Only if Orchestration has also been licensed
options.D: Yes, but if you want to use it for other than SAM it requires additional licensing
options.E: No, you must license it separately

explanation: Performance Analytics is included with SAM Professional, but its use is scoped specifically to SAM-related dashboards and indicators. If an organization wants to use Performance Analytics for other ServiceNow modules or use cases beyond SAM, an additional PA license must be purchased.

question: When is it appropriate to create custom software products in Software Asset Management? (Choose two.)

options.A: Custom products are automatically created for anything in the Content Library
options.B: Custom products need to be created for subscriptions
options.C: When the product is not included in the Content Library
options.D: When you want to exclude product details from being provided to ServiceNow
options.E: When the product is developed in-house

explanation: Custom software products should be created in SAM when the software is not available in the ServiceNow Content Library — for example, niche or regional software — or when the software has been developed internally (in-house). These products won't have Content Service data and must be manually defined to enable proper tracking and compliance management.

question: What is required to manage utilization of the Software Asset Management Content Service?

options.A: The service must be opted in to and can be opted out of in the future if required
options.B: The service is automatically enabled through the baseline installation but can be opted out of if required
options.C: A script must be defined to identify what information should be shared with the Content Service
options.D: Nothing. The service is automatically enabled and cannot be opted out of
options.E: The service must be opted in to but, once enabled, it cannot be opted out of

explanation: The SAM Content Service requires an explicit opt-in by the administrator before it becomes active, but organizations retain the flexibility to opt out at any time if they no longer wish to participate. This gives customers control over whether their software discovery data is shared with ServiceNow to contribute to and benefit from the shared Content Library.

question: Which is defined as the "Estimated cost of remediating non-compliance" on the Software Asset Workspace License usage view?
explanation: The True-up cost on the Software Asset Workspace License usage view represents the estimated financial cost of remediating a non-compliant position — i.e., the amount an organization would need to spend to purchase additional licenses to cover the shortfall identified during reconciliation. It is a key metric for budgeting and compliance planning.

question: Which of the following is NOT an available publisher pack?
explanation: Les Publisher Packs disponibles dans ServiceNow SAM Professional couvrent les éditeurs majeurs tels qu'IBM, VMware, Oracle, SAP et Citrix, qui font l'objet d'audits fréquents et de règles de licence complexes. NetSuite n'est pas un Publisher Pack disponible dans le catalogue SAM, ce qui en fait la bonne réponse.

question: Which features are available from the Publishers tab of the License usage view in the Software Asset Workspace? (Choose three.)
explanation: L'onglet Publishers de la vue License usage du Software Asset Workspace propose trois fonctionnalités principales : la vue de tous les éditeurs (All Publishers), la vue des éditeurs en non-conformité (Publishers Out of Compliance), et la liste des éditeurs épinglés (Pinned Publishers) pour un accès rapide. Les options Publisher Discovery Models et Publisher Software Models ne sont pas des vues disponibles directement depuis cet onglet.

question: Which report is run during contract negotiations to gain visibility of products nearing end-of-support?
explanation: Le Software Lifecycle Report est utilisé lors des négociations contractuelles pour identifier les produits logiciels approchant de leur fin de support ou de leur fin de vie. Il s'appuie sur les données du Content Library pour fournir une visibilité sur le cycle de vie des logiciels et orienter les décisions de renouvellement ou de remplacement.

question: Which is an invalid removal justification when reviewing potential Removal candidates on the License usage view?
explanation: Lors de l'examen des candidats à la suppression (Removal Candidates) dans la vue License usage, les justifications valides incluent Low Usage, Restricted Software, Unallocated et Duplicate License. « Unlicensed » n'est pas une justification de suppression valide dans ce contexte, car un logiciel non licencié doit être traité via un processus de remédiation et non de suppression.

question: What role is needed to view/manage all the reports in the License Usage view of the Software Asset Management workspace?
explanation: Le rôle sam_admin est requis pour visualiser et gérer l'ensemble des rapports disponibles dans la vue License Usage du workspace SAM. C'est le rôle disposant des privilèges les plus élevés dans SAM, permettant un accès complet à toutes les fonctionnalités administratives et de reporting.

question: Which feature is utilized to populate software usage records automatically via Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) in releases after Tokyo?

options.B: Service Graph Connector for Microsoft SCCM

explanation: À partir de la version Tokyo de ServiceNow, le Service Graph Connector for Microsoft SCCM est la fonctionnalité utilisée pour alimenter automatiquement les enregistrements d'utilisation logicielle via SCCM. Ce connecteur remplace les méthodes d'intégration précédentes et s'inscrit dans l'architecture moderne des Service Graph Connectors de ServiceNow.

question: From which module can an on-demand reconciliation be run?

options.B: Software Asset Workspace > Discovery > License Workbench
options.C: Software Asset Workspace > Reconciliation > License Workbench
options.D: Software Asset > Discovery > Run License Position Report
options.E: Software Asset Workspace > Reconciliation > Run License Position Report
options.F: Software Asset Workspace > Discovery > Run Reconciliation

explanation: Une réconciliation à la demande peut être déclenchée directement depuis la vue License usage du Software Asset Workspace. C'est depuis cette interface centrale que le SAM analyst ou l'administrateur peut lancer manuellement le processus de réconciliation pour obtenir une position de conformité actualisée.

question: Which feature allows the Software Asset Manager to track performance of the application in their environment?
explanation: Le Software performance tracker est la fonctionnalité dédiée au suivi des performances des applications dans l'environnement SAM. Il permet au Software Asset Manager de mesurer et d'évaluer l'efficacité de l'utilisation des logiciels, facilitant ainsi les décisions d'optimisation du portefeuille applicatif.

question: Within Software Asset Management there are many key terms to understand, what is the best definition for Software Allocation?

options.A: Software license details that define use rights
options.B: One or more use rights assigned to a specific device or user
options.D: The process of standardizing discovered software installation data to defined norms
options.E: The process of producing a compliance position by comparing the number of software rights acquired against the normalized software inventory

explanation: Une Software Allocation correspond à l'attribution d'un ou plusieurs droits d'utilisation à un appareil ou un utilisateur spécifique. Ce concept est essentiel pour les métriques de licence de type Per Named User ou Per Named Device, où la conformité est déterminée par l'allocation explicite des droits et non par la simple détection d'une installation.

question: After importing entitlements via the template, where should a user navigate to address any entitlement import errors?

options.A: Software Asset Workspace > Licensing > Licensing operations > Entitlement Import Errors
options.B: Software Asset Workspace > Administration > Job Results
options.C: Software Asset Workspace > Licensing > Import Entitlements
options.D: System Import Sets > Load Data > Entitlement Import Errors

explanation: Après l'importation d'entitlements via un modèle, les erreurs d'import doivent être consultées et corrigées depuis le chemin Software Asset Workspace > Licensing > Licensing operations > Entitlement Import Errors. Cet emplacement centralise les erreurs liées aux opérations d'import d'entitlements pour faciliter leur résolution.

question: An organization cannot be externally audited based on its use of what types of software?
explanation: Les logiciels de type Freeware sont distribués gratuitement sans restriction de licence commerciale, ce qui signifie qu'une organisation ne peut pas faire l'objet d'un audit externe basé sur leur utilisation. Contrairement aux logiciels commerciaux, les freewares ne génèrent aucune obligation de conformité de licence pouvant être vérifiée par un éditeur.

question: Which of the following license metrics are available within the ServiceNow baseline configuration? (Choose three.)
explanation: Dans la configuration de base de ServiceNow SAM, les métriques de licence disponibles incluent Per Named Device, Per User et Per Core. Des métriques plus avancées ou spécifiques à certains éditeurs, comme Concurrent User ou Processor Value Unit (PVU), ne font pas partie de la configuration baseline standard et nécessitent des configurations ou des Publisher Packs supplémentaires.
